tasks.name: Create GlassCard component
tasks.purpose: Create glass morphism card component with backdrop-filter blur, semi-transparent background, and subtle border using dark-mode design tokens

constraints: Must use 'use client' directive
Use backdrop-filter: blur(12px) with fallback for unsupported browsers
Background uses var(--homepage-surface) with opacity (e.g., rgba)
Border uses var(--homepage-border-subtle)
Accept children, className, and optional glow prop (boolean)
Glow prop adds accent border glow using var(--homepage-accent-glow)
Follow component pattern from existing marketing components (e.g., feature-card.tsx)

tasks.input_state: Marketing _components directory exists with dark-mode tokens from F1, no GlassCard component
tasks.output_state: GlassCard component exists with backdrop blur, semi-transparent bg, subtle border, and optional glow effect
tasks.acceptance_criterion: GlassCard component renders with backdrop-filter blur, uses homepage design tokens, accepts children/className/glow props
tasks.notes: Depends on F1 dark-mode tokens being available in CSS

tasks.name: Add GlassCard variant support
tasks.purpose: Add variant prop to GlassCard with 'default' | 'elevated' | 'featured' options for different blur/opacity levels

constraints: Use TypeScript union type for variant: 'default' | 'elevated' | 'featured'
Default variant uses standard blur/opacity from T1
Elevated variant: higher blur (16px), more opaque background
Featured variant: highest blur (20px), most opaque background, subtle accent border
Maintain backward compatibility (default prop value)
Use conditional className merging with cn()

tasks.input_state: GlassCard component exists with single default style, no variant prop
tasks.output_state: GlassCard has variant prop with 3 style variations (default, elevated, featured)
tasks.acceptance_criterion: GlassCard component has TypeScript variant prop with 3 options, each variant applies different blur/opacity levels

tasks.name: Create StatCard number display
tasks.purpose: Create the visual display portion of StatCard showing accent-colored number with optional prefix/suffix and descriptive label

constraints: Must use 'use client' directive
Number uses var(--homepage-accent) color with large, bold typography (e.g., text-5xl font-bold)
Label uses var(--homepage-text-muted) with smaller size (e.g., text-sm)
Accept value (number), label (string), prefix (optional string), suffix (optional string)
Layout: vertical flex with number above label, centered text
Support className prop for composition
No animation in this task (static display only)

tasks.input_state: Marketing _components directory exists, no StatCard component
tasks.output_state: StatCard displays accent-colored number with label, prefix, suffix props (static, no animation)
tasks.acceptance_criterion: StatCard renders number with accent color, label with muted text, accepts value/label/prefix/suffix/className props
tasks.notes: Depends on F1 dark-mode tokens being available in CSS

tasks.name: Wire StatCard count-up animation
tasks.purpose: Integrate useCountUp hook from F2 into StatCard to animate number from 0 to target on viewport entry

patterns.expected_action: animate from 0 to target value on viewport entry

constraints: Import useCountUp from '../_hooks/use-count-up'
Replace static number display with ref from useCountUp
Pass value prop to useCountUp as target
Default duration: 2 seconds (matching research recommendations)
Number updates via ref.textContent (no re-renders)
Format number with prefix/suffix after animation (e.g., '1,000+', '$500')

tasks.input_state: StatCard exists with static number display, no animation
tasks.output_state: StatCard number animates from 0 to target on viewport entry using useCountUp hook
tasks.acceptance_criterion: StatCard uses useCountUp hook, number animates on scroll, maintains prefix/suffix formatting
tasks.notes: Requires useCountUp hook from S2086.I1.F2 (external dependency - managed by orchestrator)

tasks.name: Add StatCard decimals support
tasks.purpose: Add decimals prop to StatCard for displaying values like '4.9/5' with proper formatting

constraints: Add optional decimals prop (number, default: 0)
Format number with toFixed(decimals) before adding prefix/suffix
Example: value=4.9, decimals=1, suffix='/5' → displays '4.9/5'
Maintain backward compatibility (default decimals=0 for integers)

tasks.input_state: StatCard supports integer values only, no decimals prop
tasks.output_state: StatCard supports decimals prop for formatting decimal numbers
tasks.acceptance_criterion: StatCard has decimals prop, formats numbers with specified decimal places

tasks.name: Create NoiseOverlay component
tasks.purpose: Create decorative SVG noise texture overlay for adding depth to sections and cards

constraints: Must use 'use client' directive
Render inline SVG with noise filter (feTurbulence)
Set aria-hidden='true' (decorative only)
Set pointer-events: none (no interaction)
Position absolute, inset-0 to cover parent container
Accept opacity prop (number 0-1, default: 0.05 for subtle effect)
Support className prop for composition
Optional mode prop: 'noise' | 'grid' (nice-to-have, default: 'noise')

tasks.input_state: Marketing _components directory exists, no NoiseOverlay component
tasks.output_state: NoiseOverlay component renders inline SVG noise texture with configurable opacity
tasks.acceptance_criterion: NoiseOverlay renders SVG with noise filter, aria-hidden, pointer-events-none, accepts opacity/className props
tasks.verification_command: test -f apps/web/app/\(marketing\)/_components/noise-overlay.tsx && grep -q 'feTurbulence' apps/web/app/\(marketing\)/_components/noise-overlay.tsx && grep -q 'aria-hidden' apps/web/app/\(marketing\)/_components/noise-overlay.tsx && grep -q 'pointer-events.*none' apps/web/app/\(marketing\)/_components/noise-overlay.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add NoiseOverlay grid texture mode
tasks.purpose: Add 'grid' texture mode to NoiseOverlay as alternative to noise for different visual effects

constraints: Add mode prop: 'noise' | 'grid' (default: 'noise')
Grid mode uses SVG pattern with lines instead of feTurbulence
Grid pattern: horizontal and vertical lines with subtle opacity
Maintain aria-hidden and pointer-events-none for both modes
Use conditional rendering based on mode prop

tasks.input_state: NoiseOverlay has noise mode only, no mode prop
tasks.output_state: NoiseOverlay supports mode prop with 'noise' and 'grid' options
tasks.acceptance_criterion: NoiseOverlay has mode prop, renders grid pattern when mode='grid'

tasks.name: Test card components composition
tasks.purpose: Verify all three card components render correctly with dark-mode tokens, animations work, and components compose together properly

constraints: Run pnpm typecheck to verify no type errors
Run pnpm lint to verify code quality
Visual verification: GlassCard renders with backdrop blur and tokens
Visual verification: StatCard animates number on scroll
Visual verification: NoiseOverlay adds texture without blocking interaction
Test composition: GlassCard can wrap StatCard and NoiseOverlay
Test variants: GlassCard elevated and featured variants render correctly
Test accessibility: aria-hidden on NoiseOverlay, proper contrast on all text

tasks.input_state: All three card components created with all features
tasks.output_state: Card components validated, typecheck passes, lint passes, components work together
tasks.acceptance_criterion: pnpm typecheck passes, pnpm lint passes, all components render with dark-mode styling, animations work, composition works
tasks.verification_command: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test:unit -- --grep 'card components' 2>/dev/null || echo 'No unit tests yet (acceptable)'
